name: Rundll32 Internet Connection Detected
description: rundll32 that communicates with public IP addresses are detected. Adversaries often abuse legitimate Windows utilities like rundll32.exe to execute malicious code and establish command and control (C2) communication. This is a highly suspicious behavior as rundll32.exe does not typically initiate outbound network connections.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the outbound network connection initiated by `rundll32.exe` at `{timestamp}` on host `{hostname}`. The connection was established to the public IP address `{destination_address}` on port `{destination_port}`. Analyze the full command line of the `rundll32` process (`{command_line}`) and the user (`{user_name}`) who executed it. Determine the purpose of this connection and if it is part of a malicious C2 channel. Provide a summary of your findings and recommend immediate network blocking and host containment.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The time the network connection was initiated.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname where the activity was detected.

parameters.name: destination_address
parameters.description: The public IP address to which rundll32.exe connected.

parameters.name: destination_port
parameters.description: The port used for the network connection.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line of the rundll32.exe process.

parameters.name: user_name
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.
